strengths: 15+ years of full-stack engineering across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB—well exceeds 6-year requirement
Current Staff role at re:cinq demonstrates direct AI-agent infrastructure and MCP work, aligning with job's AI agent development requirement
Strong testing culture evidenced through TDD practice, test-focused workshops, and CI/CD infrastructure experience
concerns: Nest.js—a primary stack technology—is absent from resume despite being listed as core framework for this role's backend work
Required testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) are not explicitly mentioned; testing experience appears broad rather than framework-specific
Career is predominantly product/platform-focused (SaaS, direct mail automation, GIS platforms); no evidence of enterprise internal automation tooling experience
response.justification: Candidate brings impressive breadth and tenure, but shows poor fit for this specific role. Nest.js—listed as primary backend stack—is entirely absent from demonstrated skills. Required testing frameworks (Vitest, Playwright, Jest) lack explicit mention, and career history is uniformly product-focused rather than enterprise internal tooling. PostgreSQL (required) and Kubernetes (required) are unmentioned. Gaps in the exact technical stack combined with domain mismatch suggest a generalist who would require significant ramp-up on core technologies.
